failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'token' in {'email': 'demo.mom@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emma Johnson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emma Johnson&size=200', ...}
